title: Dashboard (new engine) Issue

posts.author: VAC (V)
posts.cookedHtml:
The New dashboard does not show chart populated correctly for different users.
I have a dashboard with chart widget and the dashboard is only connected to a single board.
When I view the dashboard, it looks fine but the same dashboard for my colleague(s) shows all values as zero (the chart lines : X axis is date(months) and Y axis is sales number each month) . All the settings and board permissions for me and my colleague(s) are the same.
Also when we switch to old engine it works fine for all of us but the widget number is always 0 .
Does anyone have the same issue or if there isa solution to this please post.
We have also tried to delete cache but no success.

posts.author: davide.monticelli (Davide)
posts.cookedHtml: We have a similari issue. Sometimes i see the dashboard correctlt and mu collegues see the a gantt chart empty
